steps.title: Use the information context
steps.content: The fossils are so well preserved that scientists can learn details about the organisms, such as color patterns and species interactions. The blank needs a verb meaning to get or acquire information.

steps.title: Reject wrong actions
steps.content: A means inhabit or take up space, which information cannot do here. B means collect and hide away. C means set aside or hold back. None fits scientists learning from fossils. The answer is D.
